Usage: unity editors|e [options] [command]

Manage Unity editors

Options:
  -i, --installed       List installed editors
  --architecture <arch>  Filter architecture [possible values: arm64, x86_64]

Commands:
  list                  List Unity editors
  add <path...>         Register editors; accepts multiple paths

Examples:
  unity editors --installed --format json

Exit Codes:
  0                     Success
  1                     General error

Future Section:
  retained data
